Removed the call to NodeEqualityMode.setEqualityMode which is no longer used or required.
Added serialVersionUID to the anonymous JFrame subclass to suppress serialization warnings.
Added @Override annotation to the getPreferredSize method in the anonymous JFrame subclass.
Added @Override annotation to the windowClosing method in the WindowAdapter.
Added setLocationRelativeTo(null) to center the application frame on the screen.
Changed the getDesktop method from public to private to encapsulate the desktop field.
Removed trailing empty lines and excessive whitespace at the end of the file.

tetrad-gui/src/main/java/edu/cmu/tetrada.general_idea: Adjusted the line breaks and spacing in a string concatenation block for better readability or style compliance.
Updated the copyright header to include the year 2022.
Removed imports for TreeSelectionEvent, TreeSelectionListener, ActionEvent, and ActionListener that are no longer used due to lambda conversion.
Added import for TreeSelectionModel to support the new selection mode constant.
Added a null check in getSelectedModel to throw NullPointerException if no path is selected, improving robustness.
Changed tree selection mode from ListSelectionModel.SINGLE_SELECTION to TreeSelectionModel.SINGLE_TREE_SELECTION for better semantic correctness with JTree.
Converted the anonymous TreeSelectionListener class to a lambda expression for conciseness.
Added explicit 'this' references to instance variables (nodeId, sessionNode) to resolve ambiguity or improve clarity in nested contexts.
Replaced verbose new Object[]{} initialization with concise array initializer syntax.
Added an assertion to verify that the modelWrapper is not null before accessing its fields.
Converted the anonymous ActionListener class for the Help button to a lambda expression.
Replaced verbose 'CategorizingModelChooser.this' with 'this' inside the lambda context where it is unambiguous.
Marked fields in the ModelWrapper inner class as final since they are not modified after construction.
